name: Open Hip Twist
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Follow My Leader, Natural Top, Rope Spinning
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement (Open Basic; Or, 1,2 of Open Basic to Three Cha Cha Chas Back; Or 1-5 of Open Basic to Natural Top), Time Step LF, Open Hip Twist, Cuban Break LF, Split Cuban Break LF, Chase, Turkish Towel, Sweetheart, Follow My Leader, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn to L, Three Cha Cha Chas Forward (LSP), Reverse Top (6-10 or 6-15 Reverse Top)
notes:
Alternative finishing positions:
Open Position: Man turn 3/8 to L over steps 7-10
Open CPP
Contact Position:
Man turn 1/2 to L over steps 7-10, dancing chasse side and slightly forward.
Lady 3/4 to L over steps 7-10 dancing chasse with LF behind RF (Cuban Cross). Remain normal hold throughout.

steps.action: Step to side or forward in Right Side Position with slight body turn to right
comments: Heel is not lowered and knee remains flexed.
LF behind RF (Cuban Cross) to chasse LRL
Count 1 : Pressed Backward Walk

steps.action: LF behind RF (Cuban Cross) to chasse LRL, end in Fan Position
comments: Pressed Backward Walk
RF to side to chasse RLR

steps.action: Step back in Right Side Position, turn shoulders first then sharply to right
comments: Do not "fall" back, body is quite forward.
After turning 1/2 turn, RF is in front with a lot of pressure, then quick release to step back (like backward walk).
Keep right shoulder back, squeeze R side, settle.

steps.action: RF fwd in line with LF towards Man's right side to chasse RLR
comments: Turn starts at e/o previous beat.
"4": This is Pressed Forward walk with RF, a bit diagonal to L, RF crosses in front of LF, on ball of RF, demi-point, R heel is not lowered, R knee remains flexed.
RF to side, still facing Man at this moment.
: LF closed to RF, both knees bent.
1: RF to side, still facing Man at this moment.
: turn 1/4 to R.
Keep head stable.
A Twist Chasse may be danced.

steps.action: LF forward passing in front of Man
comments: Turn starts at e/o previous beat.
Turn is initiated from hips, which are turned more than upper body.
Small steps.

steps.action: RF forward in line with LF, then turn to end RF back
comments: Turn at end of beat "&".
After turning, body weight into RH, pressure with Man first (tone in RH with Man), before doing back lock.

steps.action: Back Lock LRL, end in Fan Position
comments: Body completes turn.
Man holding lady on palm, not around fingers. arms low, at lady's waist level.
End of "1": drop heel, "1&" - on "&", settle L hip, which draws in RF, preparing for next figure, e.g. Hockey Stick.
